---
title: "About"
image: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/77704356?v=4
about:
  template: jolla
  links:

    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/yusuf-sekhan-althaf/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Ticlext-Altihaf

---

About this blog
